keywords.name: clump.generate.box
keywords.description: Clumps will fully fall within this box, such that they will not overlap the box faces or edges

keywords.description: Specify that the linear size used to scale the clumps is the volume equivalent diameter of a {disk in 2D; sphere in 3D}

keywords.description: The clump density that is 1 by default

keywords.description: Range of elevations to rotate the clump template randomly about

keywords.name: clump.generate.group
keywords.description: Specify that generated clumps or pebbles are given group name <a class="reference internal" href="

keywords.name: clump.generate.id
keywords.description: The ID of the first clump generated is set to <a class="reference internal" href="
